## Which section?

- [ ] Section 1: Qualified Citizenship at Birth
- [ ] Section 2: The 10-Year Path
- [ ] Section 3: No Child Left Stateless
- [ ] Section 4: The Legacy Shield
- [ ] General / applies to multiple sections

## What is the issue?

Describe the problem with the current wording. Be specific.

## Suggested change

If you have a better way to phrase it, include it here.

## Why?

Explain why this change would make the amendment stronger.
